title: colour legend per board

posts.author: Peter-Halloush (Peter)
posts.cookedHtml:
can we have a section at the board very top showing the legend of the status where we can refer to in order to understand the subitem status perant column. and we can control the colour of the whole board’s status from that section in order to unify legend for the whole board from that control panel. and when we export to excel and share it, otherside can understand the meaning of the colours of the parent items of multiple status.
